violations.text: (Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
2 Dr Reach in freezer is in poor repair. Observed pooled water under unit. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The walls in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and front counter area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Cups were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Handwashing signage was lacking at handwashing sink in the kitchen. A sign or poster must be posted notfying employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pans and blender) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

(Various food product) was observed held at (105-118) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated food to proper temperatures during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

( Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

(Various food product and single service items ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen, front counter, and basement area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
(A wood pestle and mortar ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Wood observed chiseled and cracked. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (1 dr reach in and condiment shelf ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Hot water was lacking at the handwashing sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The 3 bay sink observed in poor repair. Leak observed at the plumbing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The walls in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 400parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC refilled sink to proper concentration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC placed label on unmarked bottle of degreaser during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
1 door freezer located in the service area was not in good repair. Inspector observed torn gasket. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. PIC ordered test strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
The faucet at 3-bay sink is loose, does not reach all 3 bays, and leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The walls in the service area are constructed of exposed wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The lights under the hood were observed not functioning during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
